findings.title: 86 uncategorized dependencies
evidence: Unknown packages: external:, external:AttributeError, external:Exception, external:RETRIES_TOTAL, external:RuntimeError, external:SystemError, external:TypeError, external:ValueError, external:_config, external:_logging
findings.remediation: Audit and categorize external dependencies

drift_findings.title: 19 undocumented module(s)
evidence: Modules without spec coverage: docs, docs/conf.py, noxfile.py, stamina, stamina/__init__.py, stamina/_config.py, stamina/_core.py, stamina/instrumentation, stamina/typing.py, tests
drift_findings.remediation: Create OpenSpec specifications for undocumented modules
